beats.what: A woman types on a keyboard while looking at a computer monitor.
The woman continues typing on the keyboard in an office setting.
The woman focuses on the screen while typing on the keyboard.
The woman types steadily on the keyboard, looking at the monitor.

formal.text: A woman operates a keyboard and monitor.
The woman continues keyboard operation in an office.
The woman maintains focus on the monitor while typing.
The woman performs steady keyboard operation.

sarcastic.text: Riveting productivity in its natural habitat.
The sheer intensity is truly breathtaking.
Another breakthrough in the world of typing.
Truly a masterclass in clicking buttons.

humorous_tech.text: [intense typing] Local environment is running perfectly.
[rapid typing] Still just a single-threaded process.
[focused typing] Wait, why is the memory leak growing?
[frantic typing] Everything is fine. Just a minor leak.

humorous_non_tech.text: She is definitely writing a very important grocery list.
Wait, now she is adding extra snacks to the list.
The snack list is getting dangerously long.
And she still hasn't even picked out the cookies.
